title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! You got so many! You're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I can't keep these all to myself! Let's give some to
my friends, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That way I can thank them for playing with me
and always supporting me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, but you should take the best plushie, Trainer!
